prompt: A 2D game UI icon for a remove button that returns the last played letter tiles back to the player's hand. The icon consists of two clean, simple parallel arrows next to each other pointing straight downwards. Clean and friendly flat design with no gradients, no shadows, no 3D depth, no text, and no background, just the clean icon on a solid transparent background. The arrows are drawn in a flat, solid neutral medium-light gray color (#DCDCDC) so the icon can be color-tinted later. Clean, casual, and friendly puzzle game UI style.
